emptyState.heading: Hunting ideas.
emptyState.quote0Text: An idea that is not dangerous does not deserve to be called an idea at all.

footer.tagline: Deep analysis on the forces reshaping the world.

manifesto.metaDescription: Latente is a publication that emerges in the space between noise and silence.
manifesto.lead: We are not a media outlet. We are signal for the immediate future.
manifesto.body1: In an era defined by the collapse of shared truth and the exponential acceleration of hardware, traditional analysis has become obsolete. News is noise; code, semiconductors, and genomes are the real signal.
manifesto.body2: was born from a need for intellectual survival. We observe the brutal intersection between Artificial Intelligence, the geopolitics of scarcity, and the rewriting of biology.
manifesto.quote: The visual internet will become a nostalgic museum; the real economy will operate invisibly through submarine cables at the speed of light, between machines that don't need to understand human language.
manifesto.body3: Our promise is simple: Zero friction. Zero advertising. Pure strategic intelligence, delivered without embellishment. We believe in the right to understand the invisible forces packaging the world into silicon architectures.
